cards.name: Dain
cards.quote: Iron in the blood is no small thing when winter comes to the North.

cards.name: Gloin
cards.quote: A son of Gloin may travel far, yet still hear the mountain calling.

cards.name: Conquerors Of Moria
cards.quote: Moria yields only to those who remember the price of silence beneath the stone.

cards.name: Dragon Hunters
cards.quote: When the sky burns, only the grim-willed stand close enough to answer.

cards.name: Dwarven Archers
cards.quote: A shaft loosed from the dark goes farther when the hand that sends it is steady.

cards.name: Dwarven Axemen
cards.quote: The axe is a plain answer, and the mountains have always favored plain answers.

cards.name: Dwarven Explorers
cards.quote: The deepest roads are found by the patient eye and the loyal lamp.

cards.name: Dwarven Miners
cards.quote: Every true hoard begins with a spark of iron against the old rock.

cards.name: Dwarven Pikeshields
cards.quote: A wall of spear and shield will stand where arrogance breaks itself.

cards.name: Dwarven Siege
cards.quote: What cannot be opened by hand may yet be persuaded by stone and fire.

cards.name: Goat Riders
cards.quote: On the high paths, a stubborn goat and a stubborn dwarf are kin.

cards.name: Miners
cards.quote: The stone yields nothing to haste, but it yields all to diligence.

cards.name: Reclaimers Of Erebor
cards.quote: The Lonely Mountain remembers every oath spoken for its return.

cards.name: Azanulimbar-Dum
cards.quote: At Azanulimbar-Dum, the walls are stern, and the silence is the silence of deep craft.

cards.name: EredLuin
cards.quote: The Blue Mountains still answer in echo, though many of their halls lie in ruin.

cards.name: IronHills
cards.quote: The Iron Hills endure like a blade laid bare to the winter wind.

cards.name: BarakShathur
cards.quote: BarakShathur keeps the grave look of the hills, as if it had been hewn to outlast grief.

cards.name: Belegost
cards.quote: The hard places of Belegost seem to answer only to patience and long memory.

cards.name: Noegrod
cards.quote: Noegrod rings with the memory of smiths, and its broken halls still listen for the hammer.

cards.name: ThorinHall
cards.quote: ThorinHall holds the hush of a dwarf-kingÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s hall, where even fire seems to speak in runes.

cards.name: Aglarond
cards.quote: Aglarond gleams like a hidden jewel in the stone, bright with the memory of deep craft.

cards.name: Floating in Barrels
cards.quote: When the river bears them onward, even a poor barrel may hide a quiet road.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Hobbit and Dwarf units on the sea in radius 5 move to the nearest land hex and gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: GoingOnAnAdventure
cards.quote: A road once named calls the stout-hearted forth.
cards.actionEffect: Hobbits and Dwarves in radius 2 gain Encouraged<sprite name="encouraged">.

cards.name: The Greenway
cards.quote: Along the old road, quick feet and faithful hearts may yet outpace the shadow.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Hobbit, Dunedain, and Dwarf units in radius 2 gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> for 2 turns.

cards.name: Riddle
cards.quote: A true word may yet turn the sword-arm aside, and set the boldest heart to doubt.
cards.actionEffect: Choose one character. Their refusal of duels ends, and you will win any duel forced on you this turn.

cards.name: The Prancing Pony
cards.quote: A welcoming inn can gather the far-wandered home.
cards.actionEffect: Move up to 2 Hobbit, Dunedain, or Dwarf allies from adjacent hexes into your hex, and heal them 10.

cards.name: Road to Rivendell
cards.quote: There are roads that remember the brave.
cards.actionEffect: Hobbits and Dwarves in radius 2 gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> and Haste <sprite name="haste">, and Fear <sprite name="fear"> and Halted <sprite name="halted"> are removed.

cards.name: RoomAtTheLastInn
cards.quote: A warm room mends what the road has frayed.
cards.actionEffect: Heal all characters in your current hex by 15.

cards.name: Erebor Beckons
cards.quote: The Mountain remembers its heirs, and the road grows shorter beneath a loyal heart.
cards.actionEffect: All Dwarves and Hobbits in this hex gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> for 2 turns.

cards.name: Through Mirkwood Shadows
cards.quote: The dark boughs press close, but stout hearts still find the hidden deer-path.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal 5 unseen forest hexes for 1 turn.

cards.name: Under Mountain Banners
cards.quote: When the old standards are raised again, even the deep halls seem to march.
cards.actionEffect: All allied Dwarf army commanders in radius 1 gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Hidden Treasure
cards.quote: Deep under broken stone, the old wealth still waits for hands bold enough to lift it.
cards.actionEffect: Gain 5 gold <sprite name="gold">.

cards.name: Troll's Hoard
cards.quote: Not all plunder belongs to the fools who piled it in the dark.
cards.actionEffect: Gain 1 random hidden artifact you do not already own.

cards.name: Vein of True Silver
cards.quote: What the mountain withholds from the idle, it yields to the stubborn and the wise.
cards.actionEffect: Gain 3 mithril <sprite name="mithril"> and replace 1 card in your hand with the Balrog encounter card.

cards.name: Seal the Lower Gates
cards.quote: Stone answers stone, and the deep way is denied to the foe.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in this hex gain Halted <sprite name="halted"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Hall of Oaths
cards.quote: Before the carved pillars, grudges are remembered and loyalties made hard as granite.
cards.actionEffect: Your PC in this hex gains +15 loyalty.

cards.name: Ashen Breath Repaid
cards.quote: What the wyrm burned, the sons of stone answer with iron and wrath.
cards.actionEffect: Remove Burning <sprite name="burning"> from all allied Dwarves in radius 1 and grant them Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Forgefire Kept
cards.quote: So long as the forge remembers its heat, the kingdom is not wholly lost.
cards.actionEffect: One allied Dwarf in this hex gains Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> for 2 turns and 1 iron <sprite name="iron">.

cards.name: Wall of Oak and Iron
cards.quote: Shield kissed shield, and the narrow way became a wall no foe could lightly break.
cards.actionEffect: All allied Dwarves in this hex gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Pitch From the Murder-Holes
cards.quote: What the deep keeps in cask and cauldron, it may pour on the heads of invaders.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in this hex gain Burning <sprite name="burning"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Raise the Inner Bastion
cards.quote: Stone laid upon stone is memory made useful against the dark.
cards.actionEffect: Increase the fort level of your PC in this hex by 1.
